name: Martinez

ingredients.ingredient: Old Tom or London Dry gin

spec.method_detail: Stir with ice until well-chilled. Strain into chilled coupe. Twist lemon peel over the top.

history: Arguably the Martini's ancestor. Jerry Thomas published a Martinez recipe in 1887. It's sweeter and more complex than a dry Martini — sweet vermouth and maraschino alongside gin. The evolutionary path from Martinez to Martini involved replacing sweet vermouth with dry and dropping the maraschino, reflecting changing tastes toward drier, more spirit-forward drinks.
